mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0) AS user_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE del_flag = 0) AS role_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_permission) AS permission_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE del_flag = 0) AS dept_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_login_log WHERE login_time >= #{todayStart}) AS today_login_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_oper_log WHERE oper_time >= #{todayStart}) AS today_oper_count
